snippet.title: Г„ter en dag som Sveriges mest krГӨsna person
snippet.description:
FГ¶r nГҘgra veckor sen bad jag er om tips pГҘ riktigt krГӨsna personer, och totalt fick jag in Г¶ver 3000 fГ¶rslag. Efter att ha lГӨst igenom varenda mejl har jag nu satt ihop en topp 3-lista Г¶ver Sveriges mest krГӨsna personer вҖ“ och det ГӨr de jag besГ¶ker i den hГӨr videon!

PГҘ tredjeplats: Kalle frГҘn JГ¶nkГ¶ping 
PГҘ andraplats: Tvillingarna Elina och Janelle 
Och pГҘ fГ¶rstaplats hittar vi Klara som fГ¶rmodligen ГӨr Sveriges mest krГӨsna person, hon ГӨter i princip bara nuggets och dricker MjГ¶lk. 

Hoppas ni gillar videon!

snippet.title: OLOF K GUSTAFSSON GER MIG 100.000KR! - RINGER ROBERTO ESCOBAR - UTMANAR JAN EMANUEL
snippet.description:
GLГ–M INTE LYSSNA PГ… CLOUT PГ… SPOTIFY!
I denhГӨr intervjun pratar jag med Olof K Gustafsson som ГӨr VD fГ¶r Escobar Inc, familjefГ¶retaget som fГ¶rvaltar Pablo Escobars varumГӨrke. Vi ringer upp Pablo Escobars bror, Roberto Escobar vilket aldrig tidigare gjorts under en intervju. Olof startar ГӨven intervjun med att ge mig 10.000 dollar i cash vilket han kallar "en gГҘva frГҘn Escobar familjen". Han utmanar ГӨven Jan Emanuel att komma och prata med honom i Colombia fГ¶r 500.000KR. Han berГӨttar att han tycker att Joakim Lundell ГӨr fake och inte har sГҘ mycket pengar som han fГҘr det att se ut och att han leasat sin Lambo. Han gГҘr vidare med att prata om EinГЎr som han ocksГҘ tycker ГӨr fake och "two faced". Han berГӨttar om sina tidigare intervjuer med Anis Don Demina & Dialogiskt och fГ¶rklarar varfГ¶r han tycker att Anis disrespectade honom.
FГ–LJ MIG PГ… INSTAGRAM -  @Reallokal  
FГ–LJ OLOF PГ… TWITTER - @olof_gustafsson
FILMAD AV DAVID MIKIC - @davidmikic
NYTT INTRO AV - @elias_eliasson03
OM DU LГ„SER DETTA GLГ–M INTE ATT PRENUMERERA!

snippet.title: OLOF K GUSTAFSSON VS. JOAKIM LUNDELL - DEBATT 18:E MAJ
snippet.description:
GLГ–M INTE ATT PRENUMERERA SГ… ATT DU INTE MISSAR DEBATTEN!
Jag och Olof K Gustafsson pratar via zoom om den kommande debatten mellan honom och Joakim Lundell som kommer att hГҘllas den 18e maj pГҘ min kanal. Olof hetsar och sГӨger att Joakim inte ska banga och visar prints pГҘ att hans klockor tydligen ska vara fake. Jag pratar om vad jag tyckte om Clueenews videodebatt. Olof pratar om Anis Don Demina och mycket mer.

snippet.title: Bianca Ingrosso lagar sin paradrГӨtt!
snippet.description:
En stor dag! Bianca Ingrosso vГӨlsignar ParadrГӨtten med sin nГӨrvaro och hГӨrliga energi. Vi hade en sГҘ mysig och rolig stund tillsammans med skratt, lite grГҘt och lite fГ¶r mycket dijon... Det blir inte bara tvГҘrГӨtters, det blir ocksГҘ avokadodrama, LidingГ¶sГҘng, ett portrГӨtt som fГҘr Bibbi att tappa hakan och det blir som alltid fina samtal. Bianca - we love you рҹӨҚ 
.
Recept pГҘ Biancas paradrГӨtt

FГ¶rrГӨtt
вҖў Friggs riskakor chiafrГ¶n & havssalt

BГ¶rja med fГ¶rrГӨtten. Bred Philadelphia pГҘ en riskaka. Mosa en halv avokado pГҘ och klicka Г¶ver en rejГӨl klick Keso. Krydda med Г¶rtsalt och chili flakes. Njut!

VarmrГӨtten: lГӨgg tonfisken i en stor skГҘl. Finhacka rГ¶dlГ¶ken och lГӨgg tillsammans med tonfisken. Klicka i crГЁme fraГ®che, majonnГӨs och dijon. HГӨll i en skvГӨtt olivolja och saften frГҘn en halv citron. Dela pickles i smГҘ bitar och lГӨgg i skГҘlen. Krydda med salt, peppar och chili flakes. RГ¶r runt!

snippet.title: Hampus ser fГӨrger fГ¶r fГ¶rsta gГҘngen

snippet.title: Kommer RMM Tillbaka? | Lagar Kinamat med Jonsson!
snippet.description:
HГӨr hittar ni Jonsson! 
Insta: https://www.instagram.com/willermm/?hl=en
Podden: ALLA GODA TING Г„R TRE:
https://open.spotify.com/show/2EVibMZrtXQGXQqTYzJ5Kj?si=AtcOs8sFR0e7FSVPlQfiVg

HГӨr Finns Jag  pГҘ TikTok: 
https://www.tiktok.com/@filippoon

Och hГӨr pГҘ Instagram: @filippoon
https://www.instagram.com/filippoon/

FГ¶r jobbkontakt: 

Filipp8n@gmail.com
______________________________

Recept:

Sweet & Sour pork!

Recept: 
4p
30min

Du behГ¶ver: 
SГҘs: 
2dl vatten
1dl ketchup
2msk socker
3msk risvinГӨger eller vitvinsvinГӨger
2msk soja
1tsk maizena + 2msk vatten till redning av sГҘs

Sweet and sour Pork:
400g karre, delad i grova tГӨrningar
1-2dl maizena
3dl rapsolja
2stor gul lГ¶k, grovhackad
2 rГ¶d paprika, grovhackad
3msk ingefГӨra, skivad i stavar
1 knippe salladslГ¶k.

Ta en kastrull och blanda alla ingredienser fГ¶r sГҘsen utom maizena och 2 msk vatten.Koka upp och lГҘt smГҘputtra ca 10min. Smaka sedan upp sГҘsen (hitta balansen). NГӨr du kГӨnner att smaken sitter blandar du i maizena utrГ¶rd i 2 msk vatten och lГҘter det koka upp sГҘ att sГҘsen tjocknar, stГӨng sedan av vГӨrmen.


TГӨrna grovt karren Hetta upp oljan i woken eller stekpannan. MjГ¶la sedan in karren i maizena och lГӨgg dom i oljan i ca 5-6 min. Fritera/stek kГ¶ttet i omgГҘngar.

NГӨr allt kГ¶tt har friterats/stekts klart sГҘ stek den grovt hackade lГ¶ken, paprikorna och den finhackade ingefГӨran pГҘ mediumvГӨrme ca 4 min. Ha sedan i kГ¶ttet och sГҘsen och rГ¶r om. Servera med nykokt ris, sesamfrГ¶n och hackad salladslГ¶k.


______________________________
MIN KГ–KSUTRUSTNING:

Kockkniv Denna rekomenderar jag!: https://adtr.co/YbViUB

Fancy Kockniv: https://adtr.co/slFyk3

Dunderkniv: https://adtr.co/z8f5PA

Kinesisk hacka: https://adtr.co/utac40

Knivblock: https://adtr.co/x8wSYs

Kniv slip jag anvГӨnder: https://adtr.co/vS1Lr6

Fint BrynstГҘl: https://adtr.co/zRn1bM

Grovt BrynstГҘl: https://adtr.co/1L5s6t

Mandolin: https://adtr.co/APUX7C

PizzastГҘl: https://adtr.co/k092uN

TrГӨskГӨrbrГӨda: https://adtr.co/kankf1

Och hГӨr pГҘ Instagram: @filippoon
https://www.instagram.com/filippoon/

FГ¶r jobbkontakt: 

Filipp8n@gmail.com
______________________________

Recept:

Sweet & Sour pork!

Recept: 
4p
30min

Du behГ¶ver: 
SГҘs: 
2dl vatten
1dl ketchup
2msk socker
3msk risvinГӨger eller vitvinsvinГӨger
2msk soja
1tsk maizena + 2msk vatten till redning av sГҘs

Sweet and sour Pork:
400g karre, delad i grova tГӨrningar
1-2dl maizena
3dl rapsolja
2stor gul lГ¶k, grovhackad
2 rГ¶d paprika, grovhackad
3msk ingefГӨra, skivad i stavar
1 knippe salladslГ¶k.

Ta en kastrull och blanda alla ingredienser fГ¶r sГҘsen utom maizena och 2 msk vatten.Koka upp och lГҘt smГҘputtra ca 10min. Smaka sedan upp sГҘsen (hitta balansen). NГӨr du kГӨnner att smaken sitter blandar du i maizena utrГ¶rd i 2 msk vatten och lГҘter det koka upp sГҘ att sГҘsen tjocknar, stГӨng sedan av vГӨrmen.


TГӨrna grovt karren Hetta upp oljan i woken eller stekpannan. MjГ¶la sedan in karren i maizena och lГӨgg dom i oljan i ca 5-6 min. Fritera/stek kГ¶ttet i omgГҘngar.

NГӨr allt kГ¶tt har friterats/stekts klart sГҘ stek den grovt hackade lГ¶ken, paprikorna och den finhackade ingefГӨran pГҘ mediumvГӨrme ca 4 min. Ha sedan i kГ¶ttet och sГҘsen och rГ¶r om. Servera med nykokt ris, sesamfrГ¶n och hackad salladslГ¶k.


______________________________

snippet.title: Professorn: SГҘ lГӨnge behГ¶ver vi leva med restriktionerna - Nyhetsmorgon (TV4)
snippet.description:
Det har nu getts Г¶ver 3 miljoner vaccindoser i Sverige. 2,3 miljoner personer har fГҘtt minst en dos vilket motsvarar 28,4 procent av den vuxna befolkningen. Och igГҘr kunde Biontech meddela att de skruvar upp produktionen och i sommar hoppas mГҘnga att det lГӨttas pГҘ restriktionerna. Ali Mirazimi, professor i virologi och sakkunnig inom FHM, fГ¶rklarar lГӨget.
Klippet kommer frГҘn Nyhetsmorgon pГҘ TV4 frГҘn 2021-04-30:
Nyhetsmorgon ГӨr TV4:s morgonprogram som funnits i rutan sedan 1992. Nyheter varvas med fГ¶rdjupande diskussioner, bevakning av de senaste trenderna, personliga intervjuer, kultur och sport. Programledare ГӨr bland andra Jenny StrГ¶mstedt, Steffo TГ¶rnquist, Jessica AlversjГ¶, Martin JГӨrborg, Soraya Lavasani, Maria Forsblom och Anders Philblad. 

Se hela avsnitt och alla klipp frГҘn Nyhetsmorgon pГҘ TV4 Play: https://www.tv4play.se/program/nyhetsmorgon

snippet.title: The Ultimate Guide to Black Holes
snippet.description:
If you want to continue thinking about black holes a tad more, you can do so by getting one of the many black hole related things the Kurzgesagt team made with love: 
https://bit.ly/3dRJj71

Sources & further reading:
https://sites.google.com/view/sources-black-holes/

Our Video on Neutronstars: https://youtu.be/udFxKZRyQt4

Black holes are the most powerful and extreme things in the universe and they are wildly weird and complicated. What would happen if you fell inside one and what are they really?

snippet.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs. Manchester City: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Manchester City picked up a decisive 2-1 win in the first leg of the UEFA semi final against Paris Saint-Germain. 

PSG came out firing in the first half and converted one of their many chances into a goal. Marquinhos scored in the 15вҖҷ to give PSG the lead. PSG kept the pressure on in the first half and finished with 9 shots on goal. 

In the second half PSG was content to sit back and defend the one goal lead. Manchester City took advantage and notched two goals both from set pieces. 
De Bruyne scored in the 64' when he tried to play the ball to the far post off of a free kick and instead found the back of the bet. Then Mahrez put the English side ahead in the 71' when he found the hole in the PSG wall off of a free kick right outside the box. 

Manchester City was able to maintain that one goal lead and will head back home with a huge advantage on aggregate. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on Paramount+:
https://www.paramountplus.com/shows/uefa-champions-league/

#UCL #UEFA #ChampionsLeague #PSG #ManCity #ManchesterCity #ParisSaintGermain

FOX News Channel (FNC) is a 24-hour all-encompassing news service delivering breaking news as well as political and business news. The number one network in cable, FNC has been the most-watched television news channel for 18 consecutive years. According to a 2020 Brand Keys Consumer Loyalty Engagement Index report, FOX News is the top brand in the country for morning and evening news coverage. A 2019 Suffolk University poll named FOX News as the most trusted source for television news or commentary, while a 2019 Brand Keys Emotion Engagement Analysis survey found that FOX News was the most trusted cable news brand. A 2017 Gallup/Knight Foundation survey also found that among Americans who could name an objective news source, FOX News was the top-cited outlet. Owned by FOX Corporation, FNC is available in nearly 90 million homes and dominates the cable news landscape, routinely notching the top ten programs in the genre.

snippet.title: Camdaki KДұz | 4. BГ¶lГјm
snippet.description:
Camdaki KДұz 4. BГ¶lГјm 

29 Nisan PerЕҹembe

KoroДҹlu ailesinin bГјtГјn engelleme Г§abalarДұna raДҹmen Sedat ve Cana'nДұn fotoДҹrafДұ gazetede yayДұnlanДұr. Haberin gГјndeme bomba gibi dГјЕҹmesi bГјtГјn gazetecileri harekete geГ§irir. 

Herkes Nalan'Дұn bu habere vereceДҹi tepkiyi merak etmektedir. Yoksa bu bГјyГјlГј aЕҹk masalДұ, daha baЕҹlamadan bitmiЕҹ midir? Haberin yayДұnlanmasДұyla KoroДҹlu MalikГўnesinde kДұyamet kopar. Ailelerinin Еҹerefi ve Еҹirket hisselerinin geleceДҹi iГ§in, bir an Г¶nce bu durumu dГјzeltmeleri ve Nalan'Дұn yГјzГјДҹГј atmasДұnДұ engellemeleri gerekmektedir.

GГјlseren BudayДұcДұoДҹluвҖҷnun aynДұ isimli romanДұndan uyarlanan, gerГ§ek bir aЕҹk hikayesinin konu alДұndДұДҹДұ Camdaki KДұz, baЕҹarДұlДұ oyuncu kadrosuyla da gГ¶z dolduruyor. Nalan karakterini Burcu BiricikвҖҷin canlandДұrdДұДҹДұ Camdaki KДұzвҖҷda; Devrim Yakut, Feri Baycu GГјler, Feyyaz ЕһerifoДҹlu, Hamza YazДұcДұ, Hande Ataizi, Merve Polat, Nihal Menzil, Nur SГјrer, Selma ErgeГ§,  Еһerif Erol, Tamer Levent, TuДҹrul TГјlek yer alДұyor. Senaryosunu Seda AltaylДұ TurgutluвҖҷnun kaleme aldДұДҹДұ, yГ¶netmenliДҹini ise Nadim GГјГ§'Гјn ГјstlendiДҹi Camdaki KДұz PerЕҹembe 20.00'de Kanal D'de!

------------------

Camdaki KДұz Trailer is streaming! Adapted from Gulseren BudayiciogluвҖҷs novel of the same name, Camdaki KДұz is based on a true love story. Kanal DвҖҷs new drama has a phenomenal cast. Burcu Biricik is going to portray the character Nalan, and the other successful actors and actresses of the series are Devrim Yakut, Feri Baycu Guler, Feyyaz Serifoglu, Hamza Yazici, Hande Ataizi, Merve Polat, Nihal Menzil, Nur Surer, Selma Ergec, Serif Erol, Tamer Levent, Tugrul Tulek. Written by Seda Altayli Turgutlu, directed by Nadim Guc, Camdaki Kiz is going to premier on 8 April Thursday at 8 pm on Kanal D!

Oyuncular:  Burcu Biricik, Devrim Yakut, Feyyez ЕһerifoДҹlu, Hamza YazДұcДұ, Hande Ataizi, Nur SГјrer, Selma ErgeГ§, Еһerif Erol, Tamer Levent, TuДҹrul TГјlek bulunuyor

Web Site : https://www.ogmpictures.com/
Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/Camdaki-K%C4%B1z-105205951609216/,
Twitter : https://twitter.com/camdakikizdizi

#CamdakiKДұz #OGMPictures #KanalD

snippet.title: Color the Spectrum LIVE- Mark Rober and Jimmy Kimmel
snippet.description:
We raised $3.63M in 3 hours!  Thanks to Jimmy Kimmel and special guests Adam Sandler, Andy Samberg, Casey Neistat, Charlize Theron, Chris Rock, Conan O'Brien, Guillermo, Jack Black, John Oliver, Jon Stewart, Kenan Thompson, Kodi Lee, Marques Brownlee, Matpat, Max Park, Maya Rudolph, MrBeast, Nikkie Glaser, Party Shirt, Paul Rudd, Sarah Silverman, Science Bob, Stephen Colbert, Terry Crews, The Merral Twins and Zack Galifianakis!

Here are more details of how the funds will be distributed by NEXT for AUTISM- https://www.nextforautism.org/current-events/color-the-spectrum/

Crypto donations are powered by Nexo. To donate before, during and after the event, head to  https://www.nexo.io/nextforautism

If you think you might be autistic, your general practitioner doctor can steer you in the right direction to get an official diagnosis.  In the meantime, here are some tools that can help:

Online diagnostic questionnaire- https://psychology-tools.com/test/autism-spectrum-quotient

Here are Samdy Sams 18 questions that might indicate you are Autistic:
1. Sensitivity to sensory stimuli, like Light and Sound?
2. Do you notice details that other people don't?
3. Do you consider yourself "Highly Sensitive"?
4. "You have many enthusiasms and get deeply fulfilled by diving into a subject" not sure what the question there would be?
5. Do you have difficulty doing things that other people find easy (like making phonecalls)?
6. Do you feel like an outsider but are unable to figure out why?
7. Have you lost friends without knowing what you did or what went wrong?
8. Do you need time to recharge from social situations. 
9. When super stressed, do you explode out of nowhere in an uncharacteristic way?
10. Do you find it hard to let things go? Do you ruminate on potential outcomes of a situation before or after the fact?
11. Are your vocal or facial expressions different from a lot of people?
12. Do you have difficulty organizing daily tasks?
13. Growing up, did you have a fascination with countercultures? Non-traditional interests?
14. Do people call you quirky, shy, or rude without you knowing what you did to acquire those labels?
15. Are you uninterested in the concept of conforming to society's views of you (especially with regards to gender or sexuality?)
16. Do you have nervous ticks such as picking, fidgeting, or tapping that you can't quit without picking up other bad habbits?
17. Can other people easily manipulate you without you realizing what they're doing?
18. Do you identify with all of these things, and feel shocked that other people don't experience life that way?

You can watch her full video here- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ot46-YGUF4Y

snippet.title: Derek Chauvin found guilty of George Floyd murder - moment the verdicts were delivered | ITV News
snippet.description:
The jury has found former Minneapolis police officer Derek Chauvin guilty of the murder and manslaughter of George Floyd.

The verdict, read out on Tuesday afternoon, was reached by a jury after less than a day of deliberations.

Mr Floyd died on May 25 last year after Chauvin, a 45-year-old white officer, was seen on video kneeling on the 46-year-old black manвҖҷs neck for about nine-and-a-half minutes.

The footage drew outrage across the US and triggered worldwide protests and violence.

snippet.title: Klas Eriksson lagar sin paradrГӨtt!
snippet.description:
Vi ГӨr tillbaka med en ny, frГӨsch och mysig sГӨsong av ParadrГӨtten! I detta fГ¶rsta avsnitt har vi finfrГӨmmat frГҘn underbara Klas Claerence Eriksson. SkГҘdespelaren och komikern som vi lГӨrt kГӨnna via Vine, Instagram, Facebook och Youtube och senare som Leif i Leif & Billy.
En otroligt varm och - vad det visar sig - spirituell person. 
Det blir en passande matrГӨtt frГҘn denna Jokkmokkman, spГӨnnande samtal, ett nГҘgot eftertГӨnksamt portrГӨtt och kanske en och annan ande... TACK fГ¶r att ni tittar, bГӨsta ParadgГӨnget рҹӨҚ
.
Recept pГҘ Klas paradrГӨtt
вҖў 2 gula lГ¶kar
вҖў 500 g renskav
вҖў 3 dl grГӨdde
вҖў 2 dl torkade kantareller
вҖў Lingonsylt
вҖў MessmГ¶r
вҖў Senap
вҖў FГӨrsk timjan
вҖў Mandelpotatis
вҖў SmГ¶r
вҖў Salt & peppar

Finhacka lГ¶ken och bryn den i en klick smГ¶r. Dela renskavet i mindre bitar och frГӨs det tillsammans med lГ¶ken. TillsГӨtt kantarellerna och lГҘt frГӨsa tills de blir lite mjuka.
HГӨll i grГӨdden och lГҘt puttra. Smaka av med senap, messmГ¶r, lingonsylt, fГӨrsk timjan och salt & peppar.
Skala hГӨlften av mandelpotatisen och koka upp i en kastrull. Antingen ГӨter du med potatis eller sГҘ rГҘkar du Г¶verkoka potatisen fГ¶r att sedan improvisera ihop nГҘgot slags potatisstomp med vГӨldigt mycket smГ¶r och salt.

"Platea" och avnjut, kanske med ett glas coca zero? Smaklig mГҘltid!рҹҚҙрҹҢІвқӨпёҸ
.
Videon innehГҘller betald reklam med Wolt рҹҚ” рҹҘ— рҹҢҪ

Vi ГӨr sГҘ glada att ha Wolt som huvudsponsor i ParadrГӨtten! 
Wolt ГӨr Nordens stГ¶rsta matleveranstjГӨnst med koldioxidkompenserade & snabba leveranser. 
Nu fГҘr du som ny kund pГҘ Wolt 100 kronor rabatt pГҘ ditt fГ¶rsta kГ¶p med hemleverans med koden вҖҳPARADRГ„TTENвҖҷ. 
FГ¶r att ta del av koden laddar du ned appen, registrerar dig och skriver in koden i din profil. Ladda ner WOLT hГӨr: https://bit.ly/3gwqyYP
Wolt finns i fГ¶ljande stГӨder: Stockholm, Г–rebro, VГӨsterГҘs, NorrkГ¶ping, LinkГ¶ping, GГӨvle, Eskilstuna, Sundsvall, Karlstad, BorГҘs, UmeГҘ, Uppsala och VГӨxjГ¶.
.
FГ¶lj oss!
Klas Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/claerence/
Sofias Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sofiadalen/
Kalles Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/kalmol/
Sofias podd: https://open.spotify.com/show/37oHwBlLa90Cui8KVchGeR?si=8fHYPKIpTpeUPEhcYbSQdA

Tack till vГҘr fotograf Daniel Riley! вҷЎ

.
Videon innehГҘller betald reklam med Wolt рҹҚ” рҹҘ— рҹҢҪ

Vi ГӨr sГҘ glada att ha Wolt som huvudsponsor i ParadrГӨtten! 
Wolt ГӨr Nordens stГ¶rsta matleveranstjГӨnst med koldioxidkompenserade & snabba leveranser. 
Nu fГҘr du som ny kund pГҘ Wolt 100 kronor rabatt pГҘ ditt fГ¶rsta kГ¶p med hemleverans med koden вҖҳPARADRГ„TTENвҖҷ. 
FГ¶r att ta del av koden laddar du ned appen, registrerar dig och skriver in koden i din profil. Ladda ner WOLT hГӨr: https://bit.ly/3gwqyYP
Wolt finns i fГ¶ljande stГӨder: Stockholm, Г–rebro, VГӨsterГҘs, NorrkГ¶ping, LinkГ¶ping, GГӨvle, Eskilstuna, Sundsvall, Karlstad, BorГҘs, UmeГҘ, Uppsala och VГӨxjГ¶.
.

Hi IвҖҷm Rick Shiels, welcome to my channel RickShielsPGAGolf. This YouTube channel is designed to help you play better golf, also to help you enjoy your golf more! 

I specialise in golf club reviews, golf club unboxing, golf club news, golf club head to heads, and all about golf clubs. 

I also want to make you play better golf by providing coaching video on all topics about golf, how to fix your slice, fix your hook, help you drive the golf ball longer, hit your irons more pure, hit your irons closer to the hole and help you draw and fade your golf shots. 
I will also help you lower your score by chipping better by stopping you duff and thin chips, pitch the ball closer and also create backspin. Also I will provide you help to putt better and hole more putts! 

On this channel I also make fun and entertaining golf content based on crazy and sometimes вҖңgimmickyвҖқ golf clubs. I like to cut through the marketing hype about products and I like to give you the honest truth about golf equipment.

snippet.title: Crew-2 Mission | Launch
snippet.description:
SpaceX and NASA are targeting Friday, April 23 for Falcon 9вҖҷs launch of DragonвҖҷs second six-month operational crew mission (Crew-2) to the International Space Station (ISS) from historic Launch Complex 39A (LC-39A) at NASAвҖҷs Kennedy Space Center in Florida. The instantaneous launch window opens at 5:49 a.m. EDT, 9:49 UTC, with a backup opportunity available on Monday, April 26 at 4:38 a.m. EDT, 8:38 UTC. 

Following stage separation, Falcon 9вҖҷs first stage will land on the вҖңOf Course I Still Love YouвҖқ droneship, which will be stationed in the Atlantic Ocean. On Saturday, April 24, at approximately 5:10 a.m. EDT, 9:10 UTC, Dragon is expected to autonomously dock with the International Space Station.

This is the first human spaceflight mission to fly astronauts on a flight-proven Falcon 9 and Dragon. The Falcon 9 first stage supporting this mission previously launched the Crew-1 mission in November 2020 and the Dragon spacecraft previously flew Robert Behnken and Douglas Hurley to and from the International Space Station during SpaceXвҖҷs Demo-2 mission in 2020. 

The webcast will go live approximately 4 hours ahead of launch.

snippet.title: Get to know the NEW STARS of Snabba Cash
snippet.description:
Watch the cast of Snabba Cash share their best memories from filming, their thoughts on the show's politics, and find out who was the most charming person on set.

About Snabba Cash:
The Swedish language reboot sets in Stockholm ten years after the events depicted in the film trilogy. In the center of the story is Leya, a young single mom trying to make it within the startup- scene. It is a buzzing environment where the craving for status and money is stronger than ever and Leya is determined to make it, no matter what. Starring Evin Ahmad, Alexander Abdallah, Ali Alarik, Olle Sarri, Dada Fungula Bozela and Jozef Wojciechowicz (Z.E).

About Netflix:
Netflix is the world's leading streaming entertainment service with over 195 million paid memberships in over 190 countries enjoying TV series, documentaries and feature films across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can watch as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, on any internet-connected screen. Members can play, pause and resume watching, all without commercials or commitments.

snippet.title: Prince Philip's funeral: the key moments
snippet.description:
The funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh has taken place at St George's Chapel in Windsor.

The Queen led her family in mourning her husband of 73 years.

The service was led by the Dean of Windsor, who paid tribute to Prince Philip's "kindness, humour and humanity" - as well as his "unwavering loyalty" to Her Majesty.

Sky's Jason Farrell looks at how the funeral unfolded.

snippet.title: This Unstoppable Robot Could Save Your Life
snippet.description:
This robot has applications to archaeology, space exploration, and search and rescue вҖ” with a simple elegant design inspired by a plant. Sign up to Morning Brew for free today: https://ve42.co/mb

Make your own Vine Robot! вҖ” https://www.vinerobots.org
Special thanks to A/Prof. Elliot Hawkes, Nicholas Naclerio, Margaret Coad, David Haggerty for appearing in this video and showing off your amazing robots. For more info on vine (and other types of) robots check out https://ve42.co/HawkesLab, and https://ve42.co/CHARM

Research at UCSB supported in part by the National Science Foundation grant 1944816, by an Early Career Faculty grant from NASAвҖҷs Space Technology Research Grants Program, and by the Packard Foundation.

B-roll footage of robots from the supplementary materials of (Hawkes et al., 2017) https://ve42.co/VineVideos, and from Stanford University https://ve42.co/StanfordVideo

Additional info on the intubation vine robot here: https://www.wardenchem.com/vine

References: Hawkes, E. W., Blumenschein, L. H., Greer, J. D., & Okamura, A. M. (2017). A soft robot that navigates its environment through growth. Science Robotics, 2(8). вҖ” https://ve42.co/Hawkes2017

Coad, M. M., Blumenschein, L. H., Cutler, S., Zepeda, J. A. R., Naclerio, N. D., El-Hussieny, H., ... & Okamura, A. M. (2019). Vine robots: Design, teleoperation, and deployment for navigation and exploration. IEEE Robotics & Automation Magazine, 27(3), 120-132. вҖ” https://ve42.co/Coad2019

Blumenschein, L. H., Coad, M. M., Haggerty, D. A., Okamura, A. M., & Hawkes, E. W. (2020). Design, modeling, control, and application of everting vine robots. Frontiers in Robotics and AI, 7. вҖ” https://ve42.co/Blumenschein2020

Haggerty, D. A., Naclerio, N. D., & Hawkes, E. W. (2019, November). Characterizing environmental interactions for soft growing robots. In 2019 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) (pp. 3335-3342). IEEE. вҖ” https://ve42.co/Haggerty2019

Naclerio, N. D., Hubicki, C. M., Aydin, Y. O., Goldman, D. I., & Hawkes, E. W. (2018, October). Soft robotic burrowing device with tip-extension and granular fluidization. In 2018 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) (pp. 5918-5923). IEEE. вҖ” https://ve42.co/Naclerio19

Special thanks to Patreon supporters: Anna, Mac Malkawi, Michael Schneider, Oleksii Leonov, Jim Osmun, Tyson McDowell, Ludovic Robillard, jim buckmaster, fanime96, Juan Benet, Ruslan Khroma, Robert Blum, Richard Sundvall, Lee Redden, Vincent, Marinus Kuivenhoven, Alfred Wallace, Arjun Chakroborty, Joar Wandborg, Clayton Greenwell, Pindex, Michael Krugman, Cy 'kkm' K'Nelson, Sam Lutfi, Ron Neal


Edited by Trenton Oliver
Animation by Ivan Tello
Filmed by Derek Muller
Thumbnail by Ignat Berbeci
Music by Jonny Hyman and from Epidemic Sound https://epidemicsound.com

snippet.title: NГӨr orten mГ¶ter landsbygden | Bosse & Kusinen

snippet.description:

Check this out, RS6 fans - weвҖҷve brought in every generation of the RS6 and they're going head-to-head in an almighty drag race! From the 450hp C5 through to the current 600hp C8, weвҖҷre here to find out just how these four generations of RS6 perform over the quarter-mile. 

As youвҖҷd expect, MatвҖҷs in his long term RS6, the C8. With a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 under the bonnet, it can produce 600hp & 800Nm of torque. Alongside him, weвҖҷve got Yianni in the C7. It may be powered by the same size engine as the C8, however, it can produce slightly more power (605hp), although itвҖҷs also slightly down on torque (750Nm). 

The C6 may be several years older, but when you consider itвҖҷs powered by a 5-litre twin-turbo V10, itвҖҷs surely got to be in with a shout, right? Or perhaps the C5, with its 4.2-litre twin-turbo V8, could spring a surprise? 

All we know is, thereвҖҷs only one way to find outвҖҰ LETвҖҷS RACE!

snippet.title: How Russell seriously upset Mercedes in huge Bottas F1 crash
snippet.description:
When the F1 stewards declared the massive accident between George Russell and Valtteri Bottas at Imola a racing incident, that could have been the end of it. But both drivers didnвҖҷt want to leave it there, and Mercedes boss Toto Wolff even voiced his displeasure. Against a backdrop of MercedesвҖҷ uncertain 2022 driver line-up plans - which will affect both Bottas and Russell next year - Scott Mitchell explains all the key details of what happened during the crash and why the post-race fallout was so acrimonious

#F1 #Russell #Bottas #Mercedes

snippet.title: Camdaki KДұz | 3. BГ¶lГјm
snippet.description:
Camdaki KДұz 3. BГ¶lГјm 

22 Nisan PerЕҹembe

SedatвҖҷДұn Г¶zel dairesinde gГ¶rdГјklerine bir anlam veremeyen Nalan, yaЕҹadДұklarДұnДұ kimseyle paylaЕҹamaz. Bir Еҹeylerin ters gittiДҹini hisseden Feride Г§ДұldДұrДұr ve NalanвҖҷДұn Гјzerindeki baskДұyДұ artДұrДұr. NalanвҖҷДұn, gizli dairesini birine anlatacaДҹДұ konusunda endiЕҹelenen Sedat, CanaвҖҷyla buluЕҹur. Cana, NalanвҖҷla konuЕҹup durumu dГјzeltmesini tembihler. Ancak bu buluЕҹmada bir magazincinin Г§ektiДҹi fotoДҹraflar, SedatвҖҷa pahalДұya mal olacaktДұr.

Sedat, NalanвҖҷla konuЕҹup, Г¶zel dairede gГ¶rdГјklerinin kendisine ait olmadДұДҹДұnДұ anlatДұr. Nalan, SedatвҖҷa yeniden gГјven duyar, sevdiДҹi adamla evleneceДҹi iГ§in mutludur. YaklaЕҹan felaketten habersiz olan Sedat, bu sorunu da Г§Г¶zdГјДҹГј iГ§in rahatlar.

Ancak hiГ§bir sДұr sonsuza kadar gizli kalmaz. FotoДҹraflar, KoroДҹlu malikanesinde bomba etkisi yaratДұr. Selen, Nalan ve ailesi gГ¶rmeden, fotoДҹraflarДұn basДұlmasДұnДұ engellemeyi baЕҹarabilecek midir?

GГјlseren BudayДұcДұoДҹluвҖҷnun aynДұ isimli romanДұndan uyarlanan, gerГ§ek bir aЕҹk hikayesinin konu alДұndДұДҹДұ Camdaki KДұz, baЕҹarДұlДұ oyuncu kadrosuyla da gГ¶z dolduruyor. Nalan karakterini Burcu BiricikвҖҷin canlandДұrdДұДҹДұ Camdaki KДұzвҖҷda; Devrim Yakut, Feri Baycu GГјler, Feyyaz ЕһerifoДҹlu, Hamza YazДұcДұ, Hande Ataizi, Merve Polat, Nihal Menzil, Nur SГјrer, Selma ErgeГ§,  Еһerif Erol, Tamer Levent, TuДҹrul TГјlek yer alДұyor. Senaryosunu Seda AltaylДұ TurgutluвҖҷnun kaleme aldДұДҹДұ, yГ¶netmenliДҹini ise Nadim GГјГ§'Гјn ГјstlendiДҹi Camdaki KДұz PerЕҹembe 20.00'de Kanal D'de!

GГјlseren BudayДұcДұoДҹluвҖҷnun aynДұ isimli romanДұndan uyarlanan, gerГ§ek bir aЕҹk hikayesinin konu alДұndДұДҹДұ Camdaki KДұz, baЕҹarДұlДұ oyuncu kadrosuyla da gГ¶z dolduruyor. snippet.title: Janne Raninen,#51, вҖқSolvalla, Gangsterkrig, Arlanda rГҘnet, Kartellen och livstidsstraff.вҖқ
snippet.description:
Dragan "Jokso" JoksoviДҮ, fГ¶dd 11 augusti 1956 i Pljevlja, Jugoslavien, dГ¶d 4 februari 1998 i Stockholm, var en svensk-jugoslavisk krogГӨgare. Polisen ansГҘg att JoksoviДҮ kunde kallas Stockholms "gangsterkung". Man kunde dock inte beslГҘ honom med andra brott ГӨn ringa narkotikabrott, misshandel och Г¶vergrepp i rГӨttssak.
 Janne Raninen hade inte ens fyllt 21 ГҘr nГӨr han ГҘtog sig att mГ¶rda Dragan Joksovic i februari 1998, som dГҘ ansГҘgs som en av den undre vГӨrldens dГҘ  mГӨktigaste mГӨn. Mordet blev upptakten till ett gangsterkrig inom restaurangbranschen. PГҘ kvГӨllen 9 juli 1998 mГ¶rdade fyra mГӨn en fГ¶re detta torped pГҘ puben Broder Tuck i Stockholm. Den 26 oktober 2006 dГ¶mdes Raninen till livstids fГӨngelse av Helsingfors hovrГӨtt fГ¶r ett annat mord ,pГҘ sin barndomsvГӨn,knutet till ett rГҘn vid Arlanda i juli 2002.
Under tiden i fГӨngelse var han med och bildade rapgruppen Kartellen.  Hans brottsliga liv fortsatte och i dag ГӨr han nyligen frigiven fГ¶r mordet pГҘ sin fГ¶re detta barndomsvГӨn.

snippet.title: Police officer fired for pepper-spraying Black and Latino lieutenant during traffic stop
snippet.description:
Bodycam and cellphone video shows how a Virginia officer pepper-sprayed a Black and Latino Army lieutenant during a traffic stop in December. Christina Ruffini reports on the details of the stop and the lawsuit against the officers.

snippet.description:

Do we need nuclear energy to stop climate change? More and more voices from science, environmental activists and the press have been saying so in recent years вҖ“ but this comes as a shock to those who are fighting against nuclear energy and the problems that come with it. So who is right? Well - it is complicated.

en-GB.title: Do we Need Nuclear Energy to Stop Climate Change?
en-GB.description:
The first 1000 people to use this link will get a free trial of Skillshare: 
https://skl.sh/kurzgesagtinanutshell05211

Sources & further reading:
https://sites.google.com/view/sourcesclimatenuclear/

Do we need nuclear energy to stop climate change? More and more voices from science, environmental activists and the press have been saying so in recent years вҖ“ but this comes as a shock to those who are fighting against nuclear energy and the problems that come with it. So who is right? Well - it is complicated.

snippet.title: BETYGSГ„TTER BILTEMAS MENY - 100% Г„RLIG!
snippet.description:
Reklam fГ¶r Anyfin
Ladda ner Anyfin-appen och lГҘt dem sГӨnka rГӨntan pГҘ dina delbetalningar, kreditkort och privatlГҘn. LГҘter det som nГҘgot fГ¶r dig? LГӨs mer om Anyfins omdГ¶me pГҘ Trustpilot fГ¶r att se hur de har hjГӨlpt andra. https://www.trustpilot.com/review/anyfin.com.

Hur funkar Anyfin?  
AnsГ¶k utan kostnad genom att hГӨmta din faktura med BankID eller skicka in en bild pГҘ den. Som ny kund, glГ¶m inte att ange koden FILIPAPRIL21  fГ¶r att fГҘ tre mГҘnader rГӨntefritt!
Om Anyfin kan sГӨnka dina kostnader fГҘr du ett erbjudande. KГӨnns det bra? DГҘ ГӨr det bara att signera.
Anyfin betalar av din skuld och du fГҘr nya, bГӨttre villkor.
FramГ¶ver betalar du till Anyfin med sГӨnkt rГӨnta och utan fakturaavgift. Anyfin ger endast ut ett erbjudande om de kan fГ¶rbГӨttra din tidigare rГӨnta.

UtГ¶ver att sГӨnka rГӨntan, erbjuder ГӨven Anyfin-appen fler verktyg som kan hjГӨlpa dig fГ¶rbГӨttra din ekonomiska hГӨlsa, sГҘ som Budget Bootcamp, Kreditblocken, MГҘnadsekonomi, Abonnemang och Bryggan. Ladda ner Anyfin-appen eller lГӨs mer pГҘ https://anyfin.com/sv_SE

Besparingen blir 1 841 kr om ett lГҘn pГҘ 13 000 kr flyttas till Anyfin vid fГ¶ljande exempel: RГ¶rliga rГӨntan gГҘr frГҘn 18.88 % till 9.48% och den administrativa avgiften frГҘn 19 kr till 0 kr. Den nya mГҘnadskostnaden blir dГҘ 597 kr med 24 mГҘnaders ГҘterbetalningstid, den effektiva rГӨntan blir 9.9% och det totala beloppet att ГҘterbetala 14 322 kr.
Anyfin erbjuder alltid individuell rГӨntor och har i snitt sГӨnkt sina kunders effektiva rГӨnta med 64%.
AnsГ¶kan som visas i videon ГӨr inte en ansГ¶kan med en riktig kredit, utan ГӨr endast en demo fГ¶r att visa hur Anyfin fungerar.

FГ¶lj mig pГҘ instagram:

2. https://www.instagram.com/fint_som_fagel/

Min debutsingel: shorturl.at/rL679

snippet.title: Inside Troye Sivan's Victorian-Era Melbourne Home | Open Door | Architectural Digest
snippet.description:
Today Architectural Digest brings you to Australia to visit Troye Sivan at his beautiful Melbourne home. Unpretentious yet expertly decorated, Troye collaborated with designer David Flack of local firm Flack Studio to bring the vision of his sunny, soulful home to life. An erstwhile brick factory and handball court, the property was transformed into a residence in 1970 by architect John Mockridge, preserving the essence of its Victorian-era origins. Today, itвҖҷs an eclectically decorated sanctuary - and a home for TroyeвҖҷs artistic imagination.

See more of Troye's home at ArchitecturalDigest.com: https://www.architecturaldigest.com/story/inside-australian-phenomenon-troye-sivans-soulful-melbourne-home

Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ„Щғ Ш№ШЁШҜШ§Щ„Щ„ЩҮ Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҠ ЩҠШӘШөЩ„ ШЁШіЩҠШҜШ© ШЈШұШҜЩҶЩҠШ© ШөШҜШұ Ш№Щ„ЩҠЩҮШ§ ШӯЩғЩ… ШЁШ§Щ„ШіШ¬ЩҶ Щ„ЩӮЩҲЩ„ЩҮШ§ "ШЈШЁЩҲЩҠ ШЈШӯШіЩҶ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ„Щғ" ШЈШ«ЩҶШ§ШЎ Щ…ШҙШ§ШҜШ© ЩғЩ„Ш§Щ…ЩҠШ© Щ…Ш№ ШіЩҠШҜШ© ШЈШ®ШұЩү

snippet.title: Army of the Dead | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
In Select Theaters May and on Netflix May 21.

From filmmaker Zack Snyder (300, Watchmen, Zack SnyderвҖҷs Justice League), ARMY OF THE DEAD takes place following a zombie outbreak that has left Las Vegas in ruins and walled off from the rest of the world. When Scott Ward (Dave Bautista), a former zombie war hero whoвҖҷs now flipping burgers on the outskirts of the town he now calls home, is approached by casino boss Bly Tanaka (Hiroyuki Sanada), itвҖҷs with the ultimate proposition: break into the zombie-infested quarantine zone to retrieve $200 million sitting in a vault beneath the strip before the city is nuked by the government in 32 hours. With little left to lose, Ward takes on the challenge, assembling a ragtag team of experts for the heist. With a ticking clock, a notoriously impenetrable vault, and a smarter, faster horde of Alpha zombies closing in, only one thingвҖҷs for certain in the greatest heist ever attempted: survivors take all.

Starring Dave Bautista, Ella Purnell, Omari Hardwick, Ana de la Reguera, Theo Rossi, Matthias SchweighГ¶fer, Nora Arnezeder, Hiroyuki Sanada, Tig Notaro, RaГәl Castillo, Huma Qureshi, Samantha Win, Michael Cassidy, Richard Cetrone, and Garret Dillahunt.

SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/29qBUt7

About Netflix:
Netflix is the world's leading streaming entertainment service with 204 million paid memberships in over 190 countries enjoying TV series, documentaries and feature films across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can watch as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, on any internet-connected screen. Members can play, pause and resume watching, all without commercials or commitments.

Army of the Dead | Official Trailer | Netflix 
https://youtube.com/Netflix

After a zombie outbreak in Las Vegas, a group of mercenaries takes the ultimate gamble by venturing into the quarantine zone for the greatest heist ever.

snippet.title: Nassif Zeytoun - Aw'at [Till Death Series] (2021) / [Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ Щ„Щ„Щ…ЩҲШӘ] ЩҶШ§ШөЩҠЩҒ ШІЩҠШӘЩҲЩҶ - ШЈЩҲЩӮШ§ШӘ
snippet.description:
Nassif Zeytoun - Aw'at [Till Death Series] (2021) / [Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ Щ„Щ„Щ…ЩҲШӘ] ЩҶШ§ШөЩҠЩҒ ШІЩҠШӘЩҲЩҶ - ШЈЩҲЩӮШ§ШӘ


Lyricist: Mazen Daher
Composer: Ahmad Barakat
Arranger: Omar Sabbagh
Digital Distribution: @WATARY 

Lyrics | ЩғЩ„Щ…Ш§ШӘ

"ШЈЩҶШ§ Щ…ЩҶ ЩҲШ¬Ш№ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш§Ш¶ЩҠ Ш¬ЩҠШӘ 
ШЈЩҶШ§ Щ…ЩҶ ЩҶЩӮШө Ш§Щ„ШӯШЁ ЩӮШіЩҠШӘ
ШЈЩҶШ§ Щ„ЩҲ Щ…Ш§ ЩӮЩ„ШЁЩҠ ЩӮЩҲЩҠШӘЩҲ
Щ…Ш§ ЩғЩҶШӘ ШЁЩҮШ§Щ„ШҜЩҶЩҠЩҠ ШЁЩӮЩҠШӘ
Щ„ЩҲ ШЁШ¬ШұШӯ ШЈЩҲШ№Щү ШӘШ№Ш§ШӘШЁЩҶЩҠ
ЩғШ§ЩҶ Щ„Ш§ШІЩ… ШЈЩҲЩӮШ№ ШӘШ§ ЩӮЩҲЩ…
Щ„ЩҲ ШЁШҜЩғ ШёШ§Щ„Щ… ШӘШӯШіШЁЩҶЩҠ
ШЈШӯШіЩҶ Щ…Ш§ ШҘШЁЩӮЩү Щ…ШёЩ„ЩҲЩ…

ШЈЩҲЩӮШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩ„ШЁ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ ШЁЩҠЩҲЩӮЩҒ
ШЁШҜЩҲ ШөШҜЩ…Ш© ШӘШ§ ШӘЩ…ШҙЩҠЩҮ
ЩҲШЈЩҲЩӮШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩ„ШЁ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ ШЁЩҠШ¶Ш№ЩҒ
ШЁШҜЩҲ Ш®ЩҠШ§ЩҶШ©  ШӘШ§ ШӘЩӮЩҲЩҠЩҮ 

Щ„Щ…Ш§ ШӘЩғЩҲЩҶ ШЁШҘЩҠШҜЩғ Щ„Ш§Щ…Ші 
ШҘЩҶЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҶЩҠЩҠ Ш№ШҜЩ„Ш§ ЩҶШ§ЩӮШө
ШӯШ· ШӯШ§Щ„Щғ Щ…ШӯЩ„ЩҠ ЩҲЩӮЩ„ЩҠ 
ШіШ§Ш№ШӘЩҮШ§ ШҘЩҶШӘ ШҙЩҲ ШӯШ§ШіШі 
ШЁШ§Щ„ШӯШ§Ш¶Шұ ШұШӯ ШӘШ§Ш®ШҜ ШӘШ§ШұЩғ 
Щ„Щ…Ш§ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш§Ш¶ЩҠ ЩӮШіЩҲШ© ЩҠШІЩҠШҜЩғ
ЩҲШӘШ§ ШӘШЁШұШҜ Ш¬ЩҲШ§ШӘЩғ ЩҶШ§ШұЩғ 
 ШұШӯ ШӘШ§Ш®ШҜ ШӯЩӮЩғ ШЁЩҗ ШҘЩҠШҜЩғ

ШЈЩҲЩӮШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩ„ШЁ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ ШЁЩҠЩҲЩӮЩҒ
ШЁШҜЩҲ ШөШҜЩ…Ш© ШӘШ§ ШӘЩ…ШҙЩҠЩҮ
ЩҲШЈЩҲЩӮШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩ„ШЁ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ ШЁЩҠШ¶Ш№ЩҒ
ШЁШҜЩҲ Ш®ЩҠШ§ЩҶШ©  ШӘШ§ ШӘЩӮЩҲЩҠЩҮ"


Subscribe to Nassif Zeytoun channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances.
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCO4AjeljgqgiowEf2yfvYHg

Visit Nassif Zeytoun official Website:
http://www.nassifzeytoun.com/
